hero_description: When emergencies happen, the closest help is often a neighbour. NearHelp activates verified responders within your radius, enabling real-time SOS broadcasting, live tracking, and AI-guided crisis assistance when every second matters.
feature1_desc: Trigger crisis alerts with auto-detected location. WebSocket-based broadcasting within configurable radius. Pulsing live map pin updates instantly.
feature2_desc: Nearby users tap “I’m Responding”. Broadcaster views live responder locations and coordinates via direct chat.
feature3_desc: CPR-certified volunteers, doctors, and skilled responders highlighted dynamically during active emergencies.
feature4_desc: AI-powered crisis guidance, emergency summaries, response history ratings, misuse detection, and anonymous threat-mode activation.
